summary: Used the projectclownfish-cluster-worker workflow for a single PR-inventory shard. No GitHub mutations are planned because instant close, merge, fix, and raise_pr are disabled; classifications are conservative and scoped to hydrated refs. Exact security-sensitive refs are routed without broadening the cluster scope.
